description: Revise SOP-WH-021 to require contemporaneous recording and explicit second-person verification ownership for all material transfers, and retrain warehouse staff on the revised procedure.
Strengthen the batch visual-inspection reconciliation review and define explicit escalation criteria for repeated borderline observations within a lot family.

Revise SOP-WH-030 (cold-chain monitoring) to require after-hours alarm-escalation testing during preventive maintenance, and add the escalation check to the planned-maintenance schedule for all GMP cold rooms.
Revise SOP-QC-012 to mandate monthly reconciliation of the calibration register against the master schedule, and route an automated overdue-calibration report to QA.
Revise SOP-PKG-018 to require documented ANSI barcode print-contrast verification at line setup and in-process, and retrain packaging operators on the revised check.
